s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 COOLER THERMISTOR (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: If using a new evaporator:

s3.ptxt: Install the No. 1 cooler thermistor to the evaporator as shown in the illustration.

s2.ptxt: If reusing the evaporator:

s3.ptxt: Install the No. 1 cooler thermistor to the evaporator as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 COOLER EVAPORATOR SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Sufficiently apply compressor oil to 2 new O-rings and the fitting surfaces. Install the 2 O-rings to the No. 1 cooler evaporator sub-assembly.
Install the No. 1 cooler evaporator sub-assembly.
Engage the 4 claws and install the plate cover with the 6 screws.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COOLER EXPANSION VALVE (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Using a 4 mm hexagon wrench, install the cooler expansion valve with the 2 hexagon bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL HEATER RADIATOR UNIT SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the heater radiator unit sub-assembly to the air conditioner radiator assembly.
Install the clamp with the screw.
Engage the 4 claws and install the heater clamp.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL AIR MIX CONTROL SERVO MOTOR (for Automatic Air Conditioning System)

s2.ptxt: Install the air mix control servo motor with the 2 screws.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL AIR OUTLET CONTROL SERVO MOTOR (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the air outlet control servo motor with the 3 screws.
Connect the 2 connectors and install the air conditioner harness.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL DRAIN COOLER HOSE (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the drain cooler hose to the air conditioner radiator assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 6 HEATER TO REGISTER DUCT ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 claws to install the No. 6 heater to register duct assembly.
Install the blower assembly with the 2 screws.
Connect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 AIR DUCT SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws to install the No. 2 air duct sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 COOLER THERMISTOR (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: If using a new evaporator:

s3.ptxt: Install the No. 1 cooler thermistor to the evaporator as shown in the illustration.

s2.ptxt: If reusing the evaporator:

s3.ptxt: Install the No. 1 cooler thermistor to the evaporator as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 COOLER EVAPORATOR SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Sufficiently apply compressor oil to 2 new O-rings and the fitting surfaces. Install the 2 O-rings to the No. 1 cooler evaporator sub-assembly.
Install the No. 1 cooler evaporator sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL HEATER RADIATOR UNIT SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the heater radiator unit sub-assembly to the air conditioner radiator assembly.
Install the clamp with the screw.
Engage the 4 claws and install the heater clamp.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL AIR OUTLET CONTROL SERVO MOTOR (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the air outlet control servo motor with the 3 screws.
Connect the 2 connectors and install the air conditioner harness.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL DRAIN COOLER HOSE (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the drain cooler hose to the air conditioner radiator assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 6 HEATER TO REGISTER DUCT ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 claws to install the No. 6 heater to register duct assembly.
Install the blower assembly with the 6 screws.
Connect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COOLER EXPANSION VALVE (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Using a 4 mm hexagon wrench, install the cooler expansion valve with the 2 hexagon bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 AIR DUCT SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws to install the No. 2 air duct sub-assembly.
